---
record_type: outbound_email

send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: Resend: INV-0001 (2025-11-03)
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-11-03 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH), attached.

Best,
Miles

Requested invoice details (2025-11-03, Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) matched canonical invoice file 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md. Wrote draft resend in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with that exact attachment and then removed processed inbox item per workflow.
